TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Tjuabal, title = Tjuabal, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjuabal} }

S.FORM: Tjuabal Itiniay i Daren Cen no Taitung ko Tjuabal a niyaro', 302 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 879 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 98% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 861 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 2% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 18 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan93%, Amis1%, Bunun1%, Rukai1%, roma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tjo~u~uab~b~vaɾ itiniaj i ɬ~ɮarən ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u tjo~u~uab~b~vaɾ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan**%, amis*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ro~u~ukai*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Tjuabal Itiniay i Daren Cen no Taitung ko Tjuabal a niyaro', 302 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 879 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 98% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 861 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 2% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 18 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan93%, Amis1%, Bunun1%, Rukai1%, roma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tjo~u~uab~b~vaɾ itiniaj i ɬ~ɮarən ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u tjo~u~uab~b~vaɾ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan**%, amis*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ro~u~ukai*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
